critique:
Critique:
Step 1 is incorrect. The function f_select_column should retain only the columns relevant to the question—specifically, season and runner up—to identify the latest runner-up. Using f_select_column(*) keeps all columns, fails to narrow the table to the necessary information, and misapplies the function’s intended purpose.
